'''zhabapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadjutress|coadjutress]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadjutress|coadjutress]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhabapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæbæpæth|zhæbæpæth]] || [[word:zhæbæpæj|zhæbæpæj]] || [[word:zhæbæpæsh|zhæbæpæsh]] || [[word:zhæbæpæ|zhæbæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhababapath|zhababapath]] || [[word:zhababapaj|zhababapaj]] || [[word:zhababapash|zhababapash]] || [[word:zhababapa|zhababapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhabapath|zhabapath]] || [[word:zhabapaj|zhabapaj]] || [[word:zhabapash|zhabapash]] || [[word:zhabapa|zhabapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhabafpath|zhabafpath]] || [[word:zhabafpaj|zhabafpaj]] || [[word:zhabafpash|zhabafpash]] || [[word:zhabafpaf|zhabafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhabapatha|zhabapatha]] || [[word:zhabapaja|zhabapaja]] || [[word:zhabapasha|zhabapasha]] || [[word:zhabapaka|zhabapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhabapath|zhabapath]] || [[word:zhabapaj|zhabapaj]] || [[word:zhabapash|zhabapash]] || [[word:zhabapa|zhabapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhabapathal|zhabapathal]] || [[word:zhabapajal|zhabapajal]] || [[word:zhabapashal|zhabapashal]] || [[word:zhabapakal|zhabapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhabapathatha|zhabapathatha]] || [[word:zhabapajaja|zhabapajaja]] || [[word:zhabapashasha|zhabapashasha]] || [[word:zhabapaka|zhabapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhabapathan|zhabapathan]] || [[word:zhabapajan|zhabapajan]] || [[word:zhabapashan|zhabapashan]] || [[word:zhabapakan|zhabapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhabapathaoro|zhabapathaoro]] || [[word:zhabapajaoro|zhabapajaoro]] || [[word:zhabapashaoro|zhabapashaoro]] || [[word:zhabapakaoro|zhabapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
